note: Initial seed — covers roughly the last 30–60 days for breadth. Daily 24-hour runs start tomorrow.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.7 launches alongside Claude Design
items.summary: Frontier Claude model with stronger long-running coding and higher-resolution vision. Paired with Claude Design for prototypes, slides, and one-pagers.

items.title: Hugging Face ships ml-intern: open-source agent that runs LLM post-training
items.summary: Built on smolagents. Reads papers, picks datasets, runs training scripts, iterates on eval. Reportedly beats Claude Code on the same scientific-reasoning benchmark.

items.title: AI agent framework field consolidates to six majors
items.summary: Claude Agent SDK, Strands (AWS), LangGraph, OpenAI Agents SDK, CrewAI, AG2 — the rest are fading. Pick based on lock-in tolerance.

items.title: Hugging Face: Spring 2026 state of open source
items.summary: Mean size of downloaded open models jumped from 827M (2023) to 20.8B (2025). Quantization and MoE doing the heavy lifting.

items.title: LangChain open-sources Deep Agents — a Claude-Code-style replica
items.summary: Subagents, lifecycle hooks, and a planning loop modeled on Claude Code's architecture. The agent-engine pattern is now commodity.
